refnamediv.refpurpose: Run a DNN with reusable preprocessing metadata.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = dnn_forward_preset(net, image, preset) out = dnn_forward_preset(net, image, preset, layer_name)

listitem.para: A DNN object returned by dnn_readmodel.
A name from dnn_presets, or a structure containing inputSize, scale, mean, std, swapRB, and crop.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: dnn_forward_preset applies one consistent preprocessing configuration and forwards it to dnn_forward. It supports scalar scaling, channel means, per-channel standard deviations, channel swapping, and cropping. Structures from dnn_zoo_modelinfo can be passed directly.

refsection.title: Examples
